# Policy Profile Gap Map

**Generated by:** Agent 36 — Policy Profile Audit  
**Date:** 2026-05-11

This document maps every policy-profile concern to its current state: ✅ exists, ⚠️ partial/stub, ❌ missing.

---

## Registration / Join Flow

| Concern | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `dateOfBirth` captured at registration | ⚠️ Partial | Field exists on User; field is **optional** — no enforcement that minors provide it |
| Age tier derived from DOB | ✅ Exists | `deriveAgeTier()` in governance kernel |
| Age tier persisted | ❌ Missing | Never stored — re-derived every request |
| Default policy profile assigned on register | ❌ Missing | Register route creates User + Profile only; no Safe defaults |
| Shell mode assigned or stored | ❌ Missing | Derived at page render; not stored |
| Child / teen defaults (scope, limits, allowed categories) | ❌ Missing | No service, no model |
| Guardian link auto-established on registration | ❌ Missing | Invite `relationship` field is stored but no AihGuardianRelationship is created |
| Onboarding step tracking | ❌ Missing | No `AihOnboardingState` model |
| Welcome policy acknowledgment | ❌ Missing | No first-login gate |

---

## Founder / Parent Policy Surface

| Concern | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Founder settings model | ❌ Missing | `AihFounderSettings` does not exist in schema |
| Configurable invite permissions | ❌ Missing | Hard-coded in governance kernel |
| Configurable posting limits | ❌ Missing | No limit model or enforcement |
| Configurable visibility defaults | ❌ Missing | Hard-coded SCOPE_MATRIX per age tier |
| Configurable approval posture | ❌ Missing | Always requires APPROVER+ perm (hard-coded) |
| Configurable trusted adult rules | ❌ Missing | Guardian permission levels exist but no policy surface to set defaults |
| Founder Settings UI (live) | ❌ Missing | `FounderSettingsPreview` is a static hardcoded card |
| Configurable add/invite limits | ❌ Missing | No limit model |
| Minor discoverability toggle | ❌ Missing | Minors are effectively undiscoverable (not in tree queries for non-guardians) but no explicit toggle |

---

## Child / Teen Experience

| Concern | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Distinct child UI shell | ✅ Exists | `shellMode = "child"` renders simplified 2-tab view |
| Child cannot see parent-only settings | ✅ Exists | Settings tab hidden for child shell |
| Allowed interest categories visible to child | ❌ Missing | No `AihInterestCategory` model or UI |
| Allowed hashtags visible to child | ❌ Missing | No hashtag model or UI |
| Friendly limit messages | ❌ Missing | Governance denials return raw reason codes; no friendly limit nudge |
| Child escalation status (pending request view) | ❌ Missing | No "your request is waiting" UI surface |
| Child requests routed to guardian | ✅ Exists | `AihApprovalRequest` created; `GuardianInbox` handles it |
| Child can see their escalations | ❌ Missing | No `GET /api/aihsafe/escalations/mine` endpoint |
| Guardian can see child's allowed interests | ❌ Missing | No interest model |
| "Write first post" prompt for child with limits | ❌ Missing | No limit-aware post prompt |

---

## Hashtags / Interest Categories

| Concern | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Schema model for allowed categories | ❌ Missing | |
| Schema model for allowed hashtags | ❌ Missing | |
| Category service | ❌ Missing | |
| Hashtag enforcement on post create | ❌ Missing | Posts have a `bodyText` field — no hashtag parsing |
| Child-safe category definition | ❌ Missing | |
| Founder allowlist management UI | ❌ Missing | |
| Child interest picker UI | ❌ Missing | |
| Guardian approval for child's interest addition | ❌ Missing | |

---

## Add-Limit / Rate-Limit Controls

| Concern | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Per-day posting limit model | ❌ Missing | |
| Per-day invite limit model | ❌ Missing | |
| Policy enforcement on post create | ❌ Missing | `canPostContent()` checks scope only, not frequency |
| Policy enforcement on invite | ❌ Missing | `canInviteToTrustUnit()` checks age tier, not count |
| Trust unit max member count | ✅ Exists | `AihTrustUnitMeta.maxMemberCount` (default 3) |
| Per-user or per-tier limit overrides | ❌ Missing | |
| Founder configurable limits | ❌ Missing | |
| Usage counters / rolling window | ❌ Missing | |

---

## Governance Coverage

| Governance concern | Status | Enforced in |
|---|---|---|
| Age tier derivation | ✅ Exists | `deriveAgeTier()` |
| Age tier boundary constants | ✅ Exists | `AGE_TIER_BOUNDARIES` |
| Minor tiers list | ✅ Exists | `MINOR_TIERS`, `isMinorTier()` |
| Approval required flag | ✅ Exists | `GovernanceDecision.requiredApproval` |
| Visibility scope matrix | ✅ Exists | `SCOPE_MATRIX`, `MAX_SCOPE_FOR_TIER` |
| Guardian relationship model | ✅ Exists | `AihGuardianRelationship` |
| Guardian permission levels | ✅ Exists | `GuardianPermissionLevel` |
| canPostContent | ✅ Exists | Scope gate by age tier |
| canComment | ✅ Exists | Scope + membership gate |
| canInvite | ✅ Exists | Minor=hard deny; adult→minor=escalate |
| canJoin | ✅ Exists | Minor=escalate |
| canCreateTrustUnit | ✅ Exists | Child=deny; teen=escalate; adult=allow |
| canExpandTrust | ✅ Exists | Minor=deny; adult→minor=escalate |
| canApproveChildAction | ✅ Exists | Requires APPROVER+ guardian perm |
| canCreateChildAccount | ✅ Exists | Minor cannot initiate |
| canManageMembership | ✅ Exists | Requires CREATOR/MODERATOR; minor target=escalate |
| FamilySafeRole derivation | ✅ Exists | `deriveFamilySafeRole()` |
| Shell mode routing | ✅ Exists | `deriveShellMode()` |
| Approval escalation creation | ✅ Exists | `AihApprovalRequest` created in API routes |
| Guardian inbox | ✅ Exists | `GuardianInbox` component |
| Audit event emission | ✅ Exists | `emitAuditEvent()` on every governance decision |
| Configurable rules | ❌ Missing | All rules are hard-coded constants |
| Per-user policy profile | ❌ Missing | No `AihPolicyProfile` model |
| Network-wide founder settings | ❌ Missing | No `AihFounderSettings` model |
| Posting frequency limits | ❌ Missing | Scope-only gate; no count check |
| Invite frequency limits | ❌ Missing | Scope-only gate; no count check |
| Hashtag/interest enforcement | ❌ Missing | Not implemented anywhere |

---

## Summary Score

| Domain | Complete | Partial | Missing |
|---|---|---|---|
| Schema | 9 | 0 | 7 |
| Types | 11 | 0 | 5 |
| Governance kernel | 13 | 0 | 0 |
| Visibility service | 4 | 0 | 0 |
| Context builder | 1 | 0 | 0 |
| API routes | 9 | 0 | 6 |
| UI surfaces | 3 | 2 | 8 |
| Services | 3 | 1 | 5 |
| Onboarding | 0 | 0 | 5 |
| Registration defaults | 0 | 1 | 4 |
| **Total** | **53** | **4** | **40** |

**Core governance engine is strong.** Policy profile layer (who sets the rules, what are the per-user defaults, how children see their allowed space) is 0% implemented.
